---
title: "Intermediate elective option 2"
author: "Shucan Zhao"
date: "2026-05-15"
format: 
  pdf:
    include-in-header: 
       text: |
         \usepackage{fvextra}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{OutputCode}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
editor: source
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---
